name: Banchou
description: Can take over their club and turn it into a gang.  - Banchou will have significantly increased success chance when interacting with members of his gang. The bonus will depend on his popularity within the gang. - The members of his gang will not attempt to slap/murder/insult the leader, and they will not see it as cheating if he sleeps around.  - In the case that the Banchou is an NPC, he will send out his gang members to do his murders for him.  - In the case that the Banchou is PC, he may give someone the "kiss of death", which will mark him as an enemy of the gang. One of the gang members will then murder him. To do the kiss of death, talk "insult" to the target, and then immediately talk "kiss" to them. - In the case that the Banchou is PC, he may order his gang members to do things to other characters. For example if you wish to order them to rape someone, tell the gang member to get along with the character you wish for him to rape and then immediately talk to them again and pick the "Force" action. The combo here is to first tell him to get along with someone, and then tell him which action to do to them. - Members of gangs will have increased success chance when interacting with members of the same gang, as well as gain additional love/like points. The bonuses depend on their popularity within the gang. Members of gangs will have decreased success chance when interacting with characters who are not in their gang. In case leaders of two gangs are on bad terms, the members of their gangs will be hostile. - Members of gangs will not enter relationships, or consent to sex with anyone who is not a member of their gang. - To invite people into your gang, ask them to join your club. This will only work if they have high love or like towards you. NPC Banchous will do this by themselves. You can tell apart the members of your gang by the fact that they will be your club members. Only your gang members will be in your club. - To kick someone out of your gang, talk "insult" to them, followed by "Go Away". If you as PC are in an NPC's gang, talk "insult" to the Banchou and then tell him to go away if you wish to quit the gang. NPC leaders will automatically kick out gang members they dislike, and gang members will automatically leave gangs that don't treat them well. [PC/NPC Module]

name: Battle Tactics

Every loss makes them stronger until they break; One Blow - on victory cripples the opponent. The damage becomes permanent if not healed soon; Exotic - so stylish that everyone around them gets horny if they win. [PC/NPC Module] -@croissant @link

name: Club Leader
description: This card is a club leader of whatever club it is in or someone who is one essentially, even if not on paper. Depending on a club, next bonuses apply to them and their club members whenever this card is present in the club room of their club: -Track: if a club member runs through a Track Field (comes in the room from the one side and leaves from the other), they train Strength and lose some Stamina; -Swimming: successful conversation between club members wearing swimsuit or club outfit at the Pool raise Strength and reduce Stamina; -Baseball: successful conversation betweeb club members at Baseball Field makes them feel more Energetic and raises Strength proportionally to their Energetic mood; -Ball Games: increased success rate for Headpats and Hugs between club members, on success raises Strength and reduces Stamina; -Martial: fights between club members in Dojo don't affect relationship, increase Strength and reduce Stamina; -Fine Arts: going to Karaoke from their clubroom increases Intelligence and reduces Stamina if at least one other club member comes with them; -Tea Ceremony: being in their clubroom increases Sociability for club members by 1, successful interactions between club members increase Intelligence and reduce Stamina; -Other: going to Arcade from their clubroom increases Intelligence and Strength and reduces Stamina if at least one other club member comes with them. [PC/NPC Module]

name: Detective
description: When murder happens the Detective gains the ability to find the Murderer - next day after murder happens during the homeroom Detective receives a notification asking to find the Murderer - once on the case the Detective can interrogate people by asking them to meet up at a place of Detective's choosing - once in the designated interrogation room they try to stay there for a while, if the Detective doesn't come they'll leave and cancel interrogation - while in the interrogation room the detective can gather three types of reports:   - talking about life will gather Trivia. It includes who was in relationship at the time of murder and current traits and modules of the friends of the person being interrogated   - talking about hobbies will gather their alibi. It includes information about where they were at the time of murder and what they were doing. They also tell who was in the same room and what they were doing too. Everyone avoids talking about the murder itself even if they witnessed it and the Murderer outright lies where they were and what they were doing   - talking about love will gather intrigues. It includes information about people's disposition to each other at the time of murder - the better Detective's relationship with the interrogated person is the more information they will give them - the Detective can read their previous reports by targeting a person and going to the library. The reports are printed in the console - the Detective can confront their suspect at any point by trying to fight them. Detective can outsmart them and the Murderer will admit their guilt, otherwise they fight - if Detective loses the case is closed with failure - if Detective wins or the Murderer confesses the case is closed. Jailers will confine the Murderer - if Detective falsely accuses somebody they will always fight back and if Detective wins the case is closed with failure and Detective loses his Detective trait. If Detective loses the case is closed. [PC Module] -@link

name: Haunted
description: The card is possessed by a phantom that stores separate play data: separate relationship points and lover status than the host. The phantom can switch bodies by giving massages. When he takes possession of someone, their free will and play data is repressed by the phantom's. The phantom will act on their own feelings and relationships from that card's body during the possession, and will have lowest virtue and highest sociability. The possession ends when he possesses a new target, or when a period ends. When a period ends the phantom goes back to the original host's body. While he's away from the original host's body, the original host has its own free will and play data. Other cards do not percieve the phantom as a separate entity, there may be a lot of misunderstandings! The phantom can take possession of PC, in which case AutoPC will be turned on for the duration. name: Human Guise
description: In folklore, deities and other supernatural beings often disguised themselves as humans. This module lets cards change styles depending on the intelligence of the card that is observing them. The higher the intelligence difference between PC and the disguised card, the more likely it is that he will see through the disguise. Keep the demon form as the default style, and in addition to it make two styles, first one called "human form", which is self-explanatory, and "transition form", which should ideally look like a mixture of both human and demon form, that others will see when they're unable to fully see through the disguise.  Full description https://pastebin.com/kakZNY4W

name: Jailer
description: Will attempt to jail those who commit offences and confine them to a room (the roof). If the prisoner attempts to leave the room they will be brought back and punished for trying to escape.  - The duration of their confinement depends on the graveness of the offense. For skipping class jail time is one day, for fights and sexual harassment two days, and for rape four days. For being caught as the perpetrator of a murder by a Detective, you get life in prison without an ability to escape.  - Depending on their mood and traits, a jailer might wish to punish the captive in various ways. If the Jailer has Schemer or Perverted traits, these punishments may be of the lewd nature.  - For the duration of the confinement, the prisoner loses their strength, has their movement speed slowed, and becomes exploitable.  - If the captive manages to run away and reach the train station during the evening, they are freed. If the Jailer finds you, you will be brought back to prison and punished, and the duration of your confinement will increase. If someone who doesn't like you witnesses your escape, they will call the jailers to your location.  - The player can play as a Jailer too. Fight the ones who commit offences to jail them, and if they attempt to escape, use the follow me action to bring them back to the roof.  - The law does not protect criminals. [PC/NPC Module]

name: Kidnapper
description: In case their sexual advances are refused, and the card that refused them has an exploitable lover, this card might go for underhanded tactics - it can blackmail exploitable characters to help them kidnap and rape their lovers. This module can be applied both to PC and NPC cards. -If PC is the target of this scheme, while your lover is the exploitable character being blackmailed, your lover might take you to a private room where the attacker will be waiting. -If PC is the exploitable character and your lover is the target of the scheme, the kidnapper will approach you telling you that they want to get closer to your lover, that you should bring them to a private room that they specify, and will threaten you. If you fail to bring your lover by the end of the period, a death flag will be set. If you wish to remove the death flag, do what you're told. -Kidnapper could also be PC. To trigger the module tell an exploitable character that you wish to get closer to their lover, and specify a room where you want them to wait for you via "Come here" action. They will bring their lover and an h scene will start once all three of you are in the same room. [PC/NPC Module]

NPCs can get pregnant and be fathers. NPCs can get each other pregnant. A pregnant card cannot get vanilla pregnancy. During the pregnancy she gets Impulsive and Always Hungry traits. She has a 25% chance to decline interactions due to mood swings - father of the child will not get hate/dislike points for being rejected due to this if he loves her. name: Summoner
description: Knows how summon and control a demon. Excerpt from their notebook: "If you wish to summon a demon you will need a suitable body to serve as its material form and a strong emotional bond to serve as its bindings. A life of your loved one would be perfect for this task. Be careful not to use weak bonds as this can lead to summoning an unbound demon and can cause disaster in your life and everyone around you. At least a week of time together should be sufficient. Once you've decided on the sacrifice you have to prepare them. Ask the loved one if they still love you. Tell them to put on the magical trinket. It will weaken their body and will and strengthen your bond. Once the vessel is ready all you need to do is spill their blood by any means available. You can orchestrate their murder or kill them yourself if you can. Don't worry if you can't go through with it yourself; not everyone is strong enough to finish off their loved one. You can perform a ritual to send their soul to hell directly without having to kill a human being with your own hands. First you will need a room with strong spiritual energies. A place of worship is ideal for this. Prepare this room by ending the period there. Do this three times in one day and by evening you have your ritual chamber ready, altar and everything. Then you have to bring your marked sacrifice to the ritual altar. Make love to them one last time and at the end of it their body will vanish. At home concentrate on the demon you would want to summon and if they answer your call you will see them the next day taking the seat of the sacrifice. Congratulations! When your time comes, you'll meet your lover again in hell."

description: Performs better than usual during exams. [PC/NPC Module]

name: Undying

name: Unlovable

name: Vengeful

name: Voyeur

name: Wants Kids

name: Wary
description: Can sense when something is off about a person and will be more hesitant to interact with them. [NPC Only Module]

name: Weight Issues
description: Character has weight gain issues and their appearance noticeably changes with their weight. Healthy lifestyle requires one meal during lunch and one meal in the evening. Eating less would lose weight, while eating more will gain it. Exercise helps to offset some extra meals. Depending on weight the style would shift from Weight_-100 to Weight_100 with any amount of granularity. Style switch happens in the morning. [PC/NPC Module]

name: Whimsical
description: Changes sexual preferences, virtue and orientation with each action. [PC/NPC Module]

name: White Knight
description: Fights to protect people who ask for their help or people that they witnessed being raped. If someone asks for protection White Knight will try to fight their abuser. Winning that fight will discourage future rape attempts for a time. If the player is a victim of rape, they can also ask for White Knight's help by spreading bad rumors about their abuser to the White Knight. [PC/NPC Module]

name: Wimp
description: Cannot refuse lewd or romantic actions if being asked by someone they like. [PC/NPC Module]

name: Yandere Type A
description: Will kill their lover if they catch them cheating. [NPC Only Module]

name: Yandere Type B
description: Will kill the one their lover cheats with if they catch them cheating. [NPC Only Module]

name: Yandere Type C
description: There is a chance they will kill people their lover doesn't like. [NPC Only Module]
